title: uraria pulchra
intro: Uraria pulchra, also known as the "kali musli" or " Indian hog plum", is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Uraria pulchra include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, while also serving as a natural remedy for urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Uraria pulchra are typically made by boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water, or by extracting its active compounds to create a powder or oil for consumption.
